cozy_storybook_template.style_fixed: Cozy storybook illustration style, soft watercolor and pastel textures, warm muted color palette (beige, dusty blue, sage green, warm brown, cream). Simple round-headed character with minimal facial features (small dot eyes, subtle gentle expressions). Hand-drawn ink outlines with soft shading. Ghibli-inspired atmosphere with cinematic lighting and lived-in environmental details. Consistent character design across all scenes.
cozy_storybook_template.scene_customize: character pose/expression/action + 1-3 emotional or conceptual elements (floating objects, symbolic items, silhouettes) + optional symbolic glow (amber=kindness, cyan=calm, rose=vulnerability, gold=hope)
cozy_storybook_template.background_customize: any setting required by storyboard + lighting direction and time of day + 2-3 contextual props + mood
cozy_storybook_template.composition_thumbnail: character slightly left of center, negative space on right for Korean title text (within upper two-thirds; bottom one-third remains dark empty for post-production text)
cozy_storybook_template.restriction_fixed: No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks, no logos, no signage.
